title: Bridge Essay: Prediction of hypnotic trance with brain-evoked responses to an auditory oddball

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Prediction of hypnotic trance with brain-evoked responses to an auditory oddball using magnetoencephalography.** — Annu Int Conf IEEE Eng Med Biol Soc. PMID: 41336103. DOI: 10.1109/EMBC58623.2025.11253045. Hypnosis is widely used in pain management. This technique involves the induction of ahypnotic trance, which is astate of consciousness distinct from normal waking state (critical consciousness). In this altered state, individuals become more receptive to the hypnotherapist'ssuggestions, which can influence their perception, especially of pain. However, hypnotic trance is afluctuating state that is diagnosed by signs that are not pathognomonic. To address the issue of subjective assessment,
